metadata.title: Cola de revisión manual - tabla maestra de alergia a betalactámicos

supersededPreviousQueue.reason: The reviewed v2 spreadsheet changed master table row numbering and provided corrected dose text for the previously flagged tigeciclina/fosfomicina rows. A new source-check queue must be generated from compact_rows_v2 if discrepancies remain.

notes: The previous manual review queue was based on the 70-row compact_rows_v1 table.
It must not be used against the reviewed 76-row compact_rows_v2 table.
Run the source checker against the v2 table and create a new queue only if v2 discrepancies remain.
This file remains non-clinical and must not be used as CDS.
